case.title: NATIONAL BUS TRAFFIC ASSOCIATION v. UNITED STATES

opinion.h1: NATIONAL BUS TRAFFIC ASSOCIATION v. UNITED STATES, 382 U.S. 369 (1966)
opinion.h4: NATIONAL BUS TRAFFIC ASSOCIATION, INC., ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE NORTHERN DISTRICT OF ILLINOIS. No. 635. Decided January 17, 1966.
opinion.p: Robert J. Bernard, Drew L. Carraway, John S. Fessenden and Richard R. Sigmon for appellants.
Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert B. Hummel, Robert W. Ginnane and Leonard S. Goodman for the United States et al.
The motion to affirm is granted and the judgment is affirmed.
opinion.h4: GREAT COASTAL EXPRESS, INC. v. UNITED STATES, 382 U.S. 369 (1966)
opinion.p: 382 U.S. 369 GREAT COASTAL EXPRESS, INC., ET AL. v. UNITED STATES ET AL. APPEAL FROM THE UNITED STATES DISTRICT COURT FOR THE EASTERN DISTRICT OF VIRGINIA. No. 677. Decided January 17, 1966.

Solicitor General Marshall, Assistant Attorney General Turner, Robert B. Hummel, Jerry Z. Pruzansky and Robert W. Ginnane for the United States et al. Francis W. McInerny for Turner's Express, Inc., et al., appellees.
The motions to affirm are granted and the judgment is affirmed.
